news.title: Steve Clarke warns Scotland not to underestimate Haiti after New Zealand rout
news.summary: Scotland face Haiti in Boston next SaturdayHaiti beat New Zealand 4-0 in Florida friendlyNapoli’s Billy Gilmour ruled out of World CupSteve Clarke believes Haiti’s routing of New Zealand could be useful as a means of dispelling Scottish arrogance towards their first World Cup opponents.
